description_long: This is a pair of rectangular-framed glasses with a full-rim design and a warm, wood-textured pattern covering the entire frame. The lenses are lightly tinted gray, providing a subtle mirrored effect that adds a modern touch. The temples are straight and slender, matching the frame's wood-like texture and featuring a slight taper toward the ear tips. Decorative white insignias resembling infinity symbols are present on the upper corners of the front frame, adding a unique accent. The bridge is a simple, flat style that seamlessly connects the two lenses. Overall, the glasses combine a classic silhouette with contemporary detailing and a distinctive surface pattern.
description: Rectangular, full-rim glasses with a wood-textured frame, gray-tinted lenses, and white insignias on the front corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular frame, gray lenses, and white insignias on both upper corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, slender temples and the consistent wood-textured pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner frame and temples, with the bridge and lens shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with moderate thickness and a flat top edge, featuring a continuous, angular structure and subtle sculpting at the bridge and temples.
attribute_lens_tint: Light gray tint with a slight mirrored effect, offering moderate transparency and a uniform color across both lenses.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, flat bridge integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads or additional sculpting.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, slender, and uniformly covered in the same wood-textured pattern as the frame, with a slight taper toward the ends and no additional embellishments.
attribute_brand_logo: White insignias resembling infinity symbols are printed on the upper outer corners of the front frame.
